metadata.purpose: Extract venue refresh lists, scraping playbooks, and event data from archived ATL Events project

venue_refresh_list.name: Terminal West
venue_refresh_list.notes: All-ages venue, consistent quality, high match for Dima's taste. AXS is official ticketing platform.

venue_refresh_list.name: Variety Playhouse
venue_refresh_list.scrape_method: AXS.com search (Primary) / 403 blocked, use Songkick/Bandsintown fallback
venue_refresh_list.notes: Intimate venue, great acoustics. Requires browser automation or aggregator search.

venue_refresh_list.name: The Eastern
venue_refresh_list.notes: Big Gigantic vibes, festival-quality electronic music. Big 3 priority venue.

venue_refresh_list.name: District Atlanta
venue_refresh_list.notes: Major electronic music hub. Covered in 19hz.info and EDMTrain.

venue_refresh_list.name: The Masquerade
venue_refresh_list.scrape_method: Direct webfetch (successful) + Browser for detailed descriptions
venue_refresh_list.genre_focus: Multi-genre (4 stages: Heaven, Hell, Purgatory, Altar)
venue_refresh_list.notes: 19 events already scraped. Minimal description data in list view—requires individual event page scraping.

venue_refresh_list.name: Believe Music Hall
venue_refresh_list.notes: Intimate, experimental electronic. Covered in 19hz.info.

venue_refresh_list.name: Tabernacle
venue_refresh_list.notes: Large venue. Downtempo and future bass compatible. Partially covered by 19hz.info.

venue_refresh_list.name: Fox Theatre
venue_refresh_list.notes: Prestigious venue, premium events. 2 events manually extracted.

venue_refresh_list.name: Dad's Garage Theatre
venue_refresh_list.notes: Already scraped (2 events). Family & adult shows.

venue_refresh_list.name: Laughing Skull Lounge
venue_refresh_list.notes: Weekly showcases. Good for date nights.

venue_refresh_list.name: High Museum
venue_refresh_list.notes: Header content only accessible without browser. Family friendly.

venue_refresh_list.name: Fernbank Museum
venue_refresh_list.notes: After Dark & Special Exhibits. Family programming.

venue_refresh_list.name: Center for Puppetry Arts
venue_refresh_list.notes: Perfect for Dean (ages 3+). Regular schedule Tues-Sun.

venue_refresh_list.notes: Already scraped (3 events). 21+ Nights and family events.

venue_refresh_list.name: Atlanta Botanical Garden
venue_refresh_list.notes: Already scraped (4 events). Garden Lights major holiday attraction.

venue_refresh_list.name: Zoo Atlanta
venue_refresh_list.scrape_method: Eventbrite search / Browser for direct site
venue_refresh_list.notes: JavaScript-heavy official site. Better accessed via Eventbrite.

venue_refresh_list.name: Stone Mountain Park
venue_refresh_list.notes: Winter/holiday attractions. Direct URL returns 404.

venue_refresh_list.name: Eddie's Attic
venue_refresh_list.notes: Identified in refresh plan. Not yet scraped. Daily live music.

venue_refresh_list.name: The Earl
venue_refresh_list.notes: Identified in refresh plan. Not yet scraped.

venue_refresh_list.name: Blind Willie's
venue_refresh_list.notes: Identified in refresh plan. Not yet scraped. Regular performances.

scraping_playbooks.coverage: Electronic/DJ events across all Atlanta venues
scraping_playbooks.notes: Already scraped Nov 12, 2025. Simple HTML structure, no bot protection. Best for electronic music completeness.

scraping_playbooks.coverage: All event categories: Music, Comedy, Food, Nightlife, Art, Sports, Family
scraping_playbooks.notes: Partial content visible without browser. Requires pagination through results. Excellent for discovering events across all categories.
scraping_playbooks.url_structure: Filter by: category (left sidebar), date range (calendar), price range
sample_events: LYFE ATL (Saturday, Lyfe ATL, Free RSVP)
Reggae on the Roof (Saturday, Cafe Circa, recurring)
Dog Man Creator Dav Pilkey (Nov 22, Pullman Yards)
Atlanta Street Wear Market (Nov 23, Expo Center)

scraping_playbooks.coverage: Broadway, Theater, Major concerts, Comedy, Sports
scraping_playbooks.notes: Requires browser automation. 403 block prevents direct WebFetch. High-value source for premium/touring acts.
sample_events: David Byrne - Who is the Sky Tour (Dec 2-3, Fox Theatre)
John Mulaney: Mister Whatever (Dec 12-13, Fox Theatre)

scraping_playbooks.notes: Official ticketing platform for 3 of the Big 5 venues. 403 block requires browser. Search venue name, then filter date range.
Event data loads after page renders. Standard WebFetch can't access content. Requires browser wait-for-render.
scraping_playbooks.extraction_challenge: Data loads via JavaScript, not in initial HTML
scraping_playbooks.expected_coverage: Most comprehensive electronic music source for all Atlanta club events

scraping_playbooks.notes: Most authoritative for underground electronic. 403 block requires browser. High-value for authentic club events.
scraping_playbooks.value_prop: Community reviews, artist lineups with descriptions, RSVP counts

scraping_playbooks.notes: Artists often use as primary tour listing. 403 block requires browser. Venue + ticket info included.

scraping_playbooks.fallback: Use AXS.com or aggregator platforms instead
scraping_playbooks.notes: Most venues use third-party ticketing (AXS, Ticketmaster, Eventbrite). Direct scraping blocked. Better ROI using ticketing platforms.

sample_events.name: Jungle Bells 2025
sample_events.artists: RUDIMENTAL, BOU, KINGS OF THE ROLLERS w/ INJA

sample_events.name: Garden Lights Holiday Nights
sample_events.notes: Annual holiday event. 20 min duration. Member discounts. Evening/Outdoor.

sample_events.name: Club 90's: Heated Rivalry Night
sample_events.notes: 90s throwback hits, epic dance-offs, iconic rivalries

evergreen_candidates.name: Garden Lights Holiday Nights
evergreen_candidates.reason: Recurring seasonal event with consistent dates

evergreen_candidates.name: The Very Hungry Caterpillar & Other Eric Carle Favorites

phase_1_highest_roi: AXS.com - Terminal West, Variety, Eastern (50-90 events)
phase_2_medium_roi: Eventbrite - Pagination through all categories (50-100 events)

python_scripts.name: add_new_events.py
python_scripts.purpose: Template for adding new events to Master CSV

python_scripts.name: consolidate_csvs.py
python_scripts.purpose: Merge multiple CSVs, remove duplicates, filter past events

python_scripts.name: taste_matcher_v2.py
python_scripts.purpose: LLM enrichment pipeline: rewrite descriptions based on taste profile
python_scripts.features: Prepare/Apply workflow for batch LLM distillation

python_scripts.name: fetch_assets.py
python_scripts.purpose: Download event posters and venue branding assets

recommended_schedule.weekly: Check Terminal West, Masquerade, Variety (15-20 min)
recommended_schedule.biweekly: Add museums, family attractions, comedy venues
recommended_schedule.monthly: Deep refresh of all venues, remove past events

data_quality_guidelines.duplicate_detection: Event_Name + Venue + Date must match exactly
data_quality_guidelines.duplicate_resolution: Keep entry with most complete metadata (most notes/details)

excellent_refresh: Spotify links added to music events
Rich notes explaining match to taste

key_findings: 19hz.info is the ONLY fully-working scraping source. All others require browser automation.
Big 3 venues (Terminal West, Variety, The Eastern) exclusively use AXS.com for ticketing—must scrape AXS, not direct URLs.
Masquerade requires dual-approach: list scraping works, but detailed descriptions need individual event page scraping.
Expected 200-350 total events from 40+ venues after full implementation.
Evergreen candidates identified: recurring holiday events, puppet shows, Saturday night series.
blocking_issues: 403 Forbidden: Ticketmaster, AXS.com, RA.co, direct venue pages
JavaScript-heavy: EDMTrain, High Museum, Fernbank Museum, Zoo Atlanta
Minimal data in list view: Masquerade (requires detail page scraping)
404s: Center Stage Theatre, Stone Mountain Park
technical_debt: Data ended prematurely on June 13, 2026 in initial refresh
Descriptions were generic AI slop until remediation_log work
Branding assets were missing—partially recovered in remediation
next_steps_for_current_site: Use 19hz.info as immediate data source (already working)
Implement browser automation for AXS, Ticketmaster (highest ROI)
Deploy taste_matcher_v2.py enrichment pipeline from remediation work
Sync venue branding assets from /assets/venues/ (already collected in remediation)
Set up recurring refresh schedule (weekly for priority venues)
